ballot_measures.number: Increase to Gas Tax, Payroll Tax, and Vehicle Registration Fees Referendum
ballot_measures.title: Increase to Gas Tax, Payroll Tax, and Vehicle Registration Fees Referendum
ballot_measures.description: Repeal sections of House Bill 3991 that increase the state's gas tax, payroll tax, and vehicle registration fees. This citizen-initiated measure is on the Oregon 2026 ballot.
